description.value:
Hylax teaches peace above all things, and you use this philosophy as a guiding light. You've become an expert in salvaging negotiations and relationships when situations go poorly.

You have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.No Cause for Alarm] skill feat. Once per day, if you would critically fail a Diplomacy check to make a [[/act request]], you can reroll the check and take the better result. This is a fortune effect.
